title: A → A
embodies: Nine sessions of Error as Method visualised as a feedback loop: the project's movement from first-order error documentation to second-order self-observation. Machine U (the researcher) at the centre; the gap between S9 and S1 marks the ongoing. Enacts von Foerster's claim that the observer who enters the description of what she observes produces a circle that closes upon itself — A implies A.
